title: AI meeting helper AI 会议助手
product_idea: Use a discovery interview before coding so vague ideas become an actionable brief. 在编码前先做需求访谈，把模糊想法变成可执行简报。
target_users: Builders with fuzzy first ideas 想法先行、需求模糊的构建者
pain_points: The user knows the desire but not the real requirement 用户知道自己想要什么，但说不清真正需求
desired_outcomes: Turn chat into a structured brief 把聊天收敛成结构化简报
core_scenarios: Clarify the first milestone 澄清第一阶段目标
non_goals: Do not design the whole system yet 暂不设计完整系统
constraints: Keep the first workflow lightweight 第一版流程保持轻量
success_metrics: A task packet can be generated from the brief 简报可以继续转成任务包
open_questions: Should the interview be capped at five rounds 访谈是否限制在五轮内
assumptions: Chinese-first wording is preferred 优先中文表达
recommended_next_step: Convert this brief into a task-packet after scope is stable. | 范围稳定后转成 task-packet | 任务包。
